titleStmt.title: SII 18.253: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 253. (B.K. No. 86 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: South-east pillar in the navaraṅga of the temple of Siddhēśvara

summary.p: This inscription belonging to the reign of Mahadēva is dated in Śaka 1191, Śukla, Kārtika śu. 1, Monday, corresponding, but for the week-day, to A.D. 1269, October 27. The week-day was Sunday.

It records the grant of the income derived from certain tolls to the god Svayaṁbhu-Siddhanātha of the agrahāra town Hāvēri by Tipparasa, the son of Dommara Nāraṇadēva, the vṛittimanta of the agrahāra. The grant was made at the instance of Samastadēśādhipati Viṭharasa, the agent of Mahāpradhāna and Sarvādhikāri Tipparasa. Viṭharasa is stated to be the uncle (māva), possibly of the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpa
cakravartti śrīvīramahadēvarājyōdayada tatupādapadumōpajīvi śrīma
numahāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri tipparasara rājyabharabhāranistārakaṁ
samastadēśādhipati māva viṭharasara nirūpadiṁ śrīmadanādiya piriya
grahāraṁ hāvēriya vrittimaṁta doṁmara nāraṇadēvana maga tipparasanu svasti (sa)
sakavaruṣa 1191 neya śuklasaṁvatsarada kārttika śuddha 1 sōmavāradaṁdu
śrīmadanādiya piriyagrahāraṁ hāvēriya śrīsvayaṁbhusiddhanāthadēva
ra sthaḷaṁgaḷa taḷabhōgakke prativaruṣavu piṁḍaḷigeyāgi tiṟuva ga 1 ma 5 nū Ā
siddhanāthadēvarige Akhaṁḍadīptige naḍasuvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyiyāgi koṭṭaru yī dharmmamaṁ Ārasugaḷu mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ pratipā
ḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō dharmmaṁ
haratē(ṁ) naraḥ ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
